scale: x/12 (sum of Concept-fit, Craft, On-screen-text/locale, Stop-power — each 1–3)

agreement.metric: share of exemplars where |judge_score - human_score| <= tolerance
agreement.note: promote >= 0.75; 0.65–0.75 = monitor; < 0.65 = noise. Krippendorff alpha >= 0.8 is the high-confidence bar (needs repeated/multi-rater runs — out of scope here).

howToRun: For each exemplar: give marketing-creative-scorer the file BODY (concept description) WITHOUT the frontmatter human_score, score per its Stage-10 four-axis rubric, record {id: judge_score} into this dir's grading.json, then run.mjs computes agreement. Three band anchors (weak ~4 / competent ~8 / strong ~11) cover the per-axis 1/2/3 levels.
